2024-03-03T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因緊急維修，連翔道下行車道(往葵涌方向)的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-03-03T14:07:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube fast lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.

2024-03-03T15:48:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , the tunnel tube slow lane of Aberdeen Tunnel (Aberdeen bound) is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.

2024-03-03T22:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Lantau Link: Due to strong wind, the following temporary traffic measure is implemented on Lantau Link: The speed limit of Lantau Link is reduced to 50km/h. Members of the public are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through radio and television broadcasts, and for the traffic signs on site.
2024-03-03T22:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 青嶼幹線： 由於強風關係，青嶼幹線已實施下列臨時交通措施： 青嶼幹線的車速限制降至每小時50 公里。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息，以及現場的交通標誌。

2024-03-03T22:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-03-03T22:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。
